description: Using Oracle SQL Developer (already connected to the HR schema), create a table named TRAINING_COURSES to track employee training programs and populate it with at least 3 records using realistic data and valid department IDs. The table must include: COURSE_ID (NUMBER, primary key), COURSE_NAME (VARCHAR2(100), NOT NULL), INSTRUCTOR (VARCHAR2(50)), DURATION_HOURS (NUMBER), DEPARTMENT_ID (NUMBER, foreign key referencing the DEPARTMENTS table), and START_DATE (DATE).
